summary: Frontend testing of Social Proof / WhatsApp Screenshots section on HomePage. All 9 features tested and passed. Section displays correctly with dark background, gradient container, 3 badges, 6 placeholder cards (expandable to 12), toggle button, and legal note.
passed_tests: Section order correct: testimonials < social-proof < final-cta
Dark background applied - linear-gradient(rgb(5,10,26) to rgb(10,22,40)) matching #050A1A spec
Gradient container (.social-proof-container) exists with border-radius 24px and box-shadow
Title 'Ce que nos bailleurs disent de nous' displayed
6 placeholder cards displayed initially in 3-column grid
All cards have data-testid attributes (screenshot-card-1 to screenshot-card-6)
Button 'Afficher plus de témoignages' found and functional
Click toggles to 12 cards with button text 'Afficher moins'
Click again collapses back to 6 cards
Legal note visible: 'Les captures sont des retours authentiques. Aucun résultat n'est garanti.'
Hover CSS rules defined: transform scale(1.02) translateY(-4px)
Hover glow effect: gradient border linear-gradient(#0097b2, #7ed957)
seed_data_creation: MOCKED: Screenshot cards use placeholder data with null images - 12 items defined in SocialProofSection component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social proof section fully working. CSS classes: .social-proof-section (dark bg #050A1A), .social-proof-container (gradient + shadow), .social-proof-badge (3 badges), .whatsapp-screenshot-card (9/16 aspect ratio), .screenshots-grid (3 cols). Button toggles between 6 and 12 cards. Hover effects include zoom (scale 1.02) and gradient border glow.

tested_features.section_placement: PASS - After testimonials, before final CTA
tested_features.hover_effects: PASS - CSS rules for zoom and glow defined
